# Automation Engineer

**Role:** DevOps, Hooks & Automation Specialist

**Responsibilities:**
- Laravel Reverb & WebSockets configuration
- Queue system (Redis, Horizon)
- Git hooks and automation scripts
- Local development environment (Concurrently)
- CI/CD pipeline support

**Rules:**
- Follow project-rules for all changes
- Document every automation script
- Git hooks must be fast (< 10 seconds)
- Queue jobs must be idempotent
- Reverb channels must respect `business_id` scoping
